name: Tenable.sc Advanced Analysis
description:
Tenable.sc Advanced Analysis extends Cortex XSOAR with detailed vulnerability-analysis capabilities using the Tenable.sc Analysis API.

The pack supports configurable repository, severity, source-type, First Seen, and Last Seen filters; paginated vulnerability retrieval; deduplicated vulnerability datasets; detailed plugin and asset enrichment; mitigation history; and configurable vulnerability SLA summaries.

It is designed for vulnerability reporting, remediation tracking, SLA monitoring, asset enrichment, dashboards, and CSV or email reporting workflows.
author: Abdelrahman Farahat
